_comment: USD per 1M tokens. Update when model pricing changes. 'agent_default_model' maps --agent values to a model id in 'models'. opencode/<model> parses the <model> segment and looks it up in 'models'; unknown models fall back to opencode-default.

session_model._comment: Assumptions used by the estimator. All values are per-session (one agent iteration).
session_model._iteration_factor_note: Empirical multiplier on DONE_STREAK_REQUIRED. Real runs rarely converge on the minimum streak; 1.7x is a conservative midpoint for streak=3 (→ ~5 iterations) and streak=1 (→ ~1.7 iterations).
